subcodes.first_line: O Asad! Upon thee be My glory! The letter of His honour Joseph - upon him be My loving-kindness - which was sent unto thee hath reached this Servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسد علیک بهائی نامه جناب یوسف علیه عنایتی که بانجناب ارسال داشت عبد حاضر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @service to others; to the Cause of God
